metadata.description: Feinschmiede — branded media plugins for Claude Code, coupled by CLI capabilities (never file paths): decks, image/2D, video, and audio, over a shared engine.

plugins.name: feinschliff-builder
plugins.description: Brand-pack authoring toolkit (compile-html, decompile, verify, improve-brand). Requires feinschliff.

plugins.name: feinschliff-extra
plugins.description: Extra brand packs for feinschliff: 10 additional themes.

plugins.name: feinklang
plugins.description: Audio voiceover — ElevenLabs text-to-speech via the clean `feinklang` CLI.

plugins.name: feinklang-consumer
plugins.description: Throwaway Phase-0 smoke test: depends on feinklang and calls it as a bare command. Not for distribution.

plugins.name: feinbild
plugins.description: Image & 2D — AI images (Replicate/Gemini), SVG, and Excalidraw diagrams via the `feinbild` CLI.

plugins.name: feinschnitt
plugins.description: Video — programmatic Remotion videos and CLI session recordings via the `feinschnitt` CLI. Composes feinbild + feinklang.

plugins.name: feinblick
plugins.description: Codebase intelligence — unified Python + skill findings, audit gate, agent report via the `feinblick` CLI.
